reasoning: The rules implement a default-deny policy with strict validation for all entities. Admin access is securely bootstrapped via a verified email check and role-based access in the users collection. Ownership is strictly enforced for orders and user profiles.

vulnerabilities.details: User profiles containing PII are restricted to the owner or admins only. No mixed content is exposed.
The 'users' collection rules explicitly prevent customers from setting their own role to 'admin' during creation or update.
Basic string size limits are implemented for names and descriptions, though could be more exhaustive across all fields.
